title: Responsive Design
description: Fix the responsive layout so the sidebar stacks below the main content on small screens using a media query
html:
Main content area with lots of text that needs to be readable on all screen sizes.
Sidebar with extra info

validationRules.message: The page should use flexbox layout
The page should have a 16px gap

hints.text: To stack flex items vertically, change the flex-direction. Think about what direction makes items stack.
In the media query, change 'flex-direction: row' to 'flex-direction: column' and set the sidebar width to '100%' or 'auto'.
